title: Must-Follow UX & Product Design Creators
subtitle: Editorial Pick
editorial: Great design doesn't happen by accident. These creators have shaped the way we think about user experience, accessibility, and product craft. Whether you're a seasoned designer or just getting started, their insights will change the way you build.

creators.name: Steve Krug
creators.title: Usability Expert & Author of "Don't Make Me Think"
creators.bio: Steve Krug is a usability consultant who has spent more than 25 years helping people understand how to design intuitive user experiences.

creators.name: Sara Soueidan
creators.title: Inclusive Design Engineer
creators.bio: An award-winning front-end engineer focused on accessibility and inclusive design, author, and speaker.

creators.name: Jony Ive
creators.title: Former Chief Design Officer at Apple
creators.bio: Sir Jonathan Ive is a British-American industrial and software designer, best known for his work at Apple.
